subcodes.first_line: O graceful branch of the divine Lote-Tree! His holiness my father, upon whom rest the Most Glorious Splendour of God, hath arrived with the brethren [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فرع رشیق سدره الهیه حضرت ابوی علیه بهاء الله الابهی با اخوان وارد و بتراب
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @business; financial; property matters, @poems and quotation from poetry
